channel.title: Veysel Emre Yılmaz — Blog
channel.description: Technical articles on .NET, Clean Architecture, microservices, and software engineering.

item.title: How I Reduced API Response Times to Under 200ms with Redis and Elasticsearch
item.description: A real-world case study on optimizing a travel booking platform's search performance using Redis caching and Elasticsearch indexing.

item.title: Event-Driven Architecture with RabbitMQ in .NET Microservices
item.description: How to decouple your microservices using RabbitMQ and MassTransit for reliable asynchronous communication.

item.title: Dockerizing .NET Microservices: A Practical Guide
item.description: From multi-stage Dockerfiles to Docker Compose orchestration — everything you need to containerize your .NET microservices.

item.title: Getting Started with CQRS Pattern in .NET Using MediatR
item.description: A step-by-step guide to implementing Command Query Responsibility Segregation with MediatR and FluentValidation.

item.title: Why I Use Clean Architecture in Every .NET Project
item.description: A practical guide to structuring .NET projects with Clean Architecture, CQRS, and MediatR for long-term maintainability.
